added: A “What’s new” page — a running list of features and fixes as they ship.
Search the gear catalog by everyday name — type “tent” to find tents, or “rucksack” and “backpack” to reach the same packs.
Women’s versions across the gear catalog — about a hundred new entries covering footwear, apparel, packs, and sleep.
Nest items one level deep — split a tent into body, fly, poles, and stakes on their own lines, with the group total on the parent row.
Drag an item into or out of a nested group — drag it right to tuck it under the row above, left to pop it back out.
Collapse a group of nested items — a chevron by the group's name hides or shows its children (and remembers your choice), just like a folder.
changed: Combined the Privacy and Terms pages into a single Legal page.
On phones, an item's extra actions (add a note, nest, un-nest) tuck into a ⋯ menu, so each row stays uncluttered — delete and drag stay put.
fixed: Nested items now work in packing mode — you can check them off, and pack progress can reach 100%.
Dragging a grouped item into another folder now carries its nested items along, so weights stay correct.
Copying a list with nested items no longer leaves hidden phantom rows in the copy.
Shared and public lists now show folders in the same order you arranged them.
Reorder items and folders from the keyboard — focus the grip and press the up/down arrows.
Search an accented brand by its plain spelling — typing "Fjallraven" now finds Fjällräven (and Klattermusen finds Klättermusen).

added: Sort any folder by name, heaviest, or lightest — or keep your own manual order.
Import a JSON backup to restore a list. Exporting and re-importing now round-trips a list at full fidelity.
A quiet line in the editor tells you when your list last saved and synced.
fixed: The undo toast is easier to catch — it now stays for ten seconds, pauses when you hover or focus it, and no longer swallows a stray click as it fades.

added: “Your lists” remembers the lists you've opened on this device, and lets you delete one.
A “Copy this list” button on shared lists, so anyone can fork their own editable copy.
Import an existing list straight from a LighterPack link or a CSV file.
A print-friendly layout and a packing checklist with check-off progress, for using a list on the trail.
Add the same item a few times and it folds into one row with a count and a worn split, e.g. “Socks ×3 · 1 worn”.

title: Mahonia is live
added: Build a packing list and share it with a link — no account, no app, no ads.
Live pack-weight totals, with a base / worn / consumable breakdown and a category bar. Weights are optional; a list with none just stays quiet.
A curated, cited gear-weight database with autocomplete, so most items weigh themselves as you type.
